content:
{
  "entities": [
    {"name": "AI Sovereignty Act", "type": "Legislation", "category": "other", "summary": "A draft legislation aiming to ensure AI sovereignty, and the first section focuses on data localization to preserve cultural and linguistic nuances of citizens. It also covers algorithmic accountability and sovereignty fees."},
    {"name": "Section 1", "type": "Section", "category": "other", "summary": "The first section of the AI Sovereignty Act, focusing on data localization for multi-modal foundation models."},
    {"name": "Section 2", "type": "Section", "category": "other", "summary": "The second section of the AI Sovereignty Act, focusing on algorithmic accountability and social impact assessments for model updates."},
    {"name": "Section 3", "type": "Section", "category": "other", "summary": "The third section of the AI Sovereignty Act, focusing on sovereignty fees and computational levies for cloud GPU compute sessions."},
    {"name": "Multi-Modal Foundation Models", "type": "Model", "category": "other", "summary": "A type of AI model that must be trained exclusively on localized data shards within national borders."},
    {"name": "Localized Data Shards", "type": "Data", "category": "other", "summary": "Data that is used to train multi-modal foundation models, ensuring cultural and linguistic nuances are preserved."},
    {"name": "Cultural Nuances", "type": "Cultural Nuances", "category": "other", "summary": "The unique cultural aspects of a society that must be preserved through data localization."},
    {"name": "Linguistic Nuances", "type": "Linguistic Nuances", "category": "other", "summary": "The unique linguistic aspects of a society that must be preserved through data localization."},
    {"name": "Citizens", "type": "Citizens", "category": "individual", "summary": "The people that the AI Sovereignty Act aims to protect by preserving their cultural and linguistic nuances."},
    {"name": "Developers", "type": "Developers", "category": "organization", "summary": "The individuals or groups responsible for updating models and conducting social impact assessments."},
    {"name": "Algorithm", "type": "Algorithm", "category": "other", "summary": "The set of rules and processes used to train and update AI models."},
    {"name": "Bias", "type": "Bias", "category": "other", "summary": "The harmful prejudice that the AI Sovereignty Act aims to prevent through social impact assessments."},
    {"name": "Minority Groups", "type": "Minority Groups", "category": "organization", "summary": "The groups that the AI Sovereignty Act aims to protect from harmful bias."},
    {"name": "Fees", "type": "Fees", "category": "other", "summary": "The charges applied to cloud GPU compute sessions to support domestic open-source alternatives."},
    {"name": "Levy", "type": "Levy", "category": "other", "summary": "A type of fee, specifically the computational levy applied to cloud GPU compute sessions."},
    {"name": "Cloud Compute Sessions", "type": "Cloud Compute Sessions", "category": "other", "summary": "The usage of cloud computing resources, which is subject to sovereignty fees and computational levies."},
    {"name": "National Utility", "type": "National Utility", "category": "organization", "summary": "The entity that receives funds from sovereignty fees to support domestic open-source alternatives."},
    {"name": "Open-Source Alternatives", "type": "Open-Source Alternatives", "category": "other", "summary": "The domestic alternatives to cloud computing that are supported by the National Utility."},
    {"name": "GPU", "type": "GPU", "category": "other", "summary": "The hardware used for cloud compute sessions, which is subject to sovereignty fees and computational levies."},
    {"name": "Assessment", "type": "Assessment", "category": "other", "summary": "The evaluation of social impact that developers must conduct for model updates exceeding 10^24 FLOPS."},
    {"name": "Weights", "type": "Weights", "category": "other", "summary": "The updated parameters of a model that must be proven not to exhibit harmful bias."},
    {"name": "FLOPS", "type": "FLOPS", "category": "other", "summary": "The unit of measurement for computational power, used to determine when a social impact assessment is required."},
    {"name": "Borders", "type": "Borders", "category": "other", "summary": "The geographical boundaries within which data localization and algorithmic accountability must be ensured."},
    {"name": "Country", "type": "Country", "category": "other", "summary": "The nation that the AI Sovereignty Act aims to protect by ensuring data localization and algorithmic accountability."}
  ],
  "relations": [
    {"source": "AI Sovereignty Act", "target": "Section 1", "relation": "is_specified_in"},
    {"source": "AI Sovereignty Act", "target": "Section 2", "relation": "is_specified_in"},

    {"source": "Algorithm", "target": "Bias", "relation": "exhibits"},

    {"source": "GPU", "target": "National Utility", "relation": "is_funded_by"},

  ]
}
